notice: Menu items are subject to change based on ingredient availability. Seafood origin: (A) Australian, (I) Imported, (M) Mixed origin.

items.title: Wagyu Shabu Shabu Set
items.summary: From June. Shared style. No alterations available. Excludes public holidays. Monday - Thursday ordering by 8pm.

items.title: Natsu Banquet
items.summary: A curated selection of seasonal dishes designed for sharing, from delicate starters to signature mains and handcrafted desserts. Whole table participation only, minimum 2 guests. Monday - Thursday ordering by 8pm. Friday - Sunday ordering by 6pm.
